Setlist
Venue Info
Media Gallery
The Meadows Music Theatre
Hartford, CT
Previous Names:
The Meadows Music Theatre (Changed after 2000)
ctnow.com Meadows Music Theatre (Changed after 2005)
New England Dodge Music Center (Changed after 2008)
Meadows Music Theatre (Changed after 2009)
Comcast Theatre (Changed after 2013)
Xfinity Theatre (Changed after 2025)
Seating Capacity: 30000
Venue Type : Outdoor Amphitheater

Total Gigs: 45
  DMB  (43)
  Dave & Tim  (2)

Longest Performance:
08.05.07 - Bartender (21:14)

Song Liberations
  7.28.06 – Sleep to Dream Her (after 1053 days)
  5.28.10 – Busted Stuff (after 2932 days)
  5.28.10 – Kit Kat Jam (after 2494 days)
  5.28.10 – Hello Again (after 1721 days)
  5.28.10 – JTR (after 1363 days)
  5.29.10 – So Right (after 1345 days)
  7.12.14 – Burning Down the House (after 1028 days)
  6.23.18 – Captain (after 1015 days)
Venue Picture
Description
Built by Turner Construction and designed by Jeter, Cook and Jepson Architects, Meadows Music Theater has a reserved seating capacity of 7,500 and a lawn capacity of a whopping 22,500.

61 Savitt Way
Hartford, CT 06120

Songs that made their debut at this venue:
Stir It Up (8.1.98)
Cornbread (full band) (8.4.07)
Lying in the Hands of God (6.6.09)
You & Me (6.6.09)
Break for It (5.28.10)
Runnin' Down a Dream (full band) (6.7.13)
Virginia in the Rain (6.12.15)
Death on the High Seas (6.12.15)
